meta.siteTitle: CHIC — Wooden Expert | Custom Wood Products Manufacturer in China
meta.siteDescription: CHIC wooden expert — a leading custom wooden box manufacturer in China. Hinged, sliding, magnetic and locked boxes in paulownia, pine, bamboo, acacia and walnut.

hero.body: CHIC is a factory-direct wooden products manufacturer in China — OEM & ODM supplier of wooden kitchenware, desk organizers, gift packaging and home storage products, built for global retailers and brands.
hero.factoryAlt: CHIC factory — Xiamen Chic Homeware Co., Ltd.

footer.newsletterTitle: Get our catalog & new product updates
footer.brandBlurb: Xiamen Chic Homeware Co.,Ltd. — custom wooden & bamboo home storage, kitchenware and packaging manufacturer for global brands.

impactBanner.headline: From product design to bulk production — handled by one team.
impactBanner.body: We're a true wooden products manufacturer, not a trading company. That means consistent quality, factory-direct pricing, and one point of contact from quotation to global delivery.

faq.intro: Quick answers about our factory, materials, and OEM & ODM services. Don't see your question below? Reach out — we usually reply within 24 hours.
faq.q1: Are you a wooden products manufacturer or a trading company?
faq.a1: We are a professional wooden products manufacturer in China, with our factory located in Cao County and a sales office in Xiamen.
faq.q2: Do you support OEM and private label production?
faq.a2: Yes. We provide OEM and ODM wooden products manufacturing services, including custom materials, sizes, logo branding, and packaging.
faq.q3: What types of wooden products do you manufacture?
faq.a3: We manufacture wooden kitchenware, storage organizers, gift boxes, desk organizers, and custom wooden homeware products.
faq.q4: Which markets do you mainly export to?
faq.a4: Our wooden products are mainly exported to the United States, Europe, Australia, and other global markets.
faq.q5: How do I choose the right wood material for my product?
faq.a5Pre: Choosing the right wood depends on product usage, target price, and market positioning. You can refer to our
faq.a5Post: for a clear comparison of common wood options used in kitchenware and storage products.

whyChooseUs.title: Why brands choose our wooden products factory
whyChooseUs.intro: We help brands and distributors source reliable, well-made wooden products with factory-direct pricing and flexible customization — at every order size.
whyChooseUs.reason1Body: Direct production in our own factory — stable quality, competitive pricing and reliable delivery without middlemen.
whyChooseUs.reason2Body: Logo branding, size adjustments, material selection and custom packaging built for your retail or marketplace requirements.
whyChooseUs.reason3Body: Every order goes through multi-step QC — material inspection, in-process check and final pre-shipment AQL audit.
whyChooseUs.reason4Body: Exporting to 60+ countries with hands-on Amazon FBA, retail-chain compliance, EU REACH and door-to-door logistics.

process.title: OEM & ODM Manufacturing Process
process.intro: From quotation and sampling to custom packaging and global shipping — a clear, reliable workflow for every order, large or small.
process.step1Body: Share your quantity, product details and requirements. We prepare a clear quotation and produce samples for your approval.
process.step2Body: After approval we finalize materials, structure, finishes and production details — locked-in spec sheet for the bulk run.
process.step2Alt: Wooden product sample on the production bench
process.step3Body: Color labels, gift boxes, kraft cartons, or Amazon drop-test packaging — we prep your goods for retail or FBA.
process.step4Body: Sea freight, express, or Amazon FBA shipping — arranged based on your destination, timeline and budget.

factory.intro: Factory-direct manufacturing in Caoxian + professional export service in Xiamen — two bases working together to deliver consistent quality, competitive pricing and smooth international shipping.
factory.prodBody: One of China's most established hubs for wooden homeware and packaging. Strong supply chain, skilled labor and cost-efficient mass production for OEM & ODM orders.
factory.salesBody: Major international port city. Our Xiamen team handles design, sampling, QC follow-up and global logistics — your single point of contact end to end.

whoWeServe.intro: We supply wooden products to brands and importers across North America, Europe and Australia.
whoWeServe.seg1Body: Drop-test certified packaging, FNSKU labelling and Amazon-ready master cartons.
whoWeServe.seg2Body: Branded wooden kitchenware, organizers and storage products with custom finishes.
whoWeServe.seg3Body: Corporate gift boxes, presentation cases and branded promotional items in low MOQ.
whoWeServe.seg4Body: Reliable bulk supply for partners across North America, Europe, Australia and Japan.
whoWeServe.marketsTitle: Shipping to 60+ countries — US, EU, UK, Australia, Japan and beyond
whoWeServe.marketsAlt: Global markets we serve — North America, Europe, Australia, Japan

categoriesGrid.title: Explore Our Product Categories
categoriesGrid.intro: Discover our range of wooden products for kitchen, home, office, hospitality and gifting.
categoriesGrid.cat1Blurb: Cutting boards, spice racks, bread boxes, cutlery organizers.
categoriesGrid.cat2Blurb: Bathroom, pantry, keepsake and countertop organizers.
categoriesGrid.cat3Blurb: Watch, jewelry, tea, coffee, wine and gift presentation boxes.
categoriesGrid.cat4Blurb: Drawer organizers, pen holders, document trays, valet trays.
categoriesGrid.cat5Blurb: Pet bowl stands, toy storage, feeding stations.
categoriesGrid.cat6Blurb: Hotel amenity trays, restaurant caddies, Airbnb welcome kits.

realProducts.intro: Selected solid wood & bamboo pieces we manufacture for global brands — every SKU customizable in size, finish, branding and packaging.

blogPreview.intro: Sourcing tips, material selection, and OEM workflow guides — written by our factory team from real production experience.

materials.titlePre: Choose the right wood for your
materials.intro: We work with a wide range of solid wood and engineered wood materials. Our team helps brands match wood choice to product function, durability, appearance, cost target, and export market requirements.

customWoodenBoxes.metaTitle: Custom Wooden Boxes Manufacturer | OEM & Wholesale Supplier China
customWoodenBoxes.metaDesc: Factory-direct custom wooden boxes for brands, retailers, and Amazon sellers. Low MOQ, OEM branding, premium wood options, and global shipping.
customWoodenBoxes.ogTitle: Custom Wooden Boxes Manufacturer for Wholesale & Private Label
customWoodenBoxes.heroLead: Factory-direct wooden box manufacturer in China — custom sizes, OEM branding, premium wood options, and export-ready packaging for brands, retailers and Amazon sellers.
customWoodenBoxes.catsTitle: Custom Wooden Box Categories for Wholesale & Private Label
customWoodenBoxes.catsIntro: Wide range of box styles for gift packaging, retail presentation, storage, and brand customization — OEM, private label, and wholesale.
customWoodenBoxes.cat1Body: Rings, necklaces, bracelets, earrings — with custom lining, velvet inserts, mirrors, compartments, and branding.
customWoodenBoxes.cat2Body: Personal gifts, memory storage, decorative packaging — custom size, wood, lid, finish, and logo.
customWoodenBoxes.cat3Body: For watch brands, collectors, promotional packaging — pillows, glass lids, metal hardware, custom logo.
customWoodenBoxes.cat4Body: Single-bottle, double-bottle, or premium gift packaging — custom dividers, handles, and branding.
customWoodenBoxes.cat5Body: For candles, cosmetics, chocolates, essential oils — custom inserts, logo branding, low MOQ OEM.
customWoodenBoxes.cat6Body: Retail display, countertop showcases — glass panels, compartments, logo printing, custom structures.
customWoodenBoxes.cat7Body: Gift packaging, seasonal promos, corporate gifting — different sizes, finishes, logos, inserts.
customWoodenBoxes.cat8Body: For tea brands, gift sets — compartments, glass lids, engraved logos, custom inner layouts.
customWoodenBoxes.cat9Body: Home organization, desktop storage, kitchen storage, decorative retail packaging.
customWoodenBoxes.stylesIntro: From hinged lid wooden boxes and sliding lid designs to magnetic closure boxes, glass lid boxes, and compartment boxes — pick the structure that fits your product.
customWoodenBoxes.style1Body: Most popular for gift packaging, storage, premium presentation. Customize hinges, locks, handles, inserts, logos.
customWoodenBoxes.style2Body: Ideal for tea, gift sets, keepsake boxes, promotional packaging. Clean look with flexible customization.
customWoodenBoxes.style3Body: Premium gift packaging — strong presentation feel without visible hardware.
customWoodenBoxes.style4Body: For jewelry, essential oils, tea bags — multi-item storage or presentation sets.
customWoodenBoxes.style5Body: Visual showcase for premium products — collector boxes, retail display, jewelry.
customWoodenBoxes.style6Body: Decorative + practical — vintage look, added security, stronger display value.
customWoodenBoxes.style7Body: Simple removable lid — perfect for chocolates, soaps, candles and stackable retail boxes.
customWoodenBoxes.style8Body: EVA foam, velvet, microfiber, molded pulp — protect product and elevate unboxing.
customWoodenBoxes.customTitle: Customization Options for Custom Wooden Boxes
customWoodenBoxes.custom1Body: Laser engraving, screen print, hot-foil stamping, UV print, embossing.
customWoodenBoxes.custom2Body: Hinged, sliding, magnetic, lift-off, lock — pick what fits your product story.
customWoodenBoxes.custom3Body: Natural oil, matte lacquer, stained, painted color, distressed, polished.
customWoodenBoxes.custom4Body: Any size from miniature ring boxes to oversized storage trunks.
customWoodenBoxes.custom5Body: Color box, kraft sleeve, FBA-ready master cartons, drop-tested.
customWoodenBoxes.custom6Body: EVA foam, velvet, microfiber, molded pulp — cut to your product.
customWoodenBoxes.matsTitle: Wood Materials for Custom Wooden Boxes
customWoodenBoxes.matsIntro: We work with paulownia, pine, acacia, walnut, camphor, and bamboo — selected based on durability, cost, and brand positioning.
customWoodenBoxes.mat1Body: Dense, oily hardwood with rich tiger-stripe grain. Premium feel, scratch resistant.
customWoodenBoxes.mat2Body: Warm farmhouse look with prominent knots. Budget-friendly solid wood.
customWoodenBoxes.mat3Body: Premium dark hardwood with elegant grain. Top tier for luxury packaging.
customWoodenBoxes.mat4Body: Lightweight at 40% lighter than pine. Stable, easy to ship, eco-conscious.
customWoodenBoxes.mat5Body: Naturally water-resistant tropical hardwood. Ideal for outdoor and high-end products.
customWoodenBoxes.mat6Body: Sustainable grass with natural water resistance. Ideal for kitchen & eco lines.
customWoodenBoxes.processTitle: How to Get Your Custom Wooden Boxes
customWoodenBoxes.processIntro: A simple 4-step process from idea to finished products.
customWoodenBoxes.step1Body: Share your logo, product type, size, or reference photos. We review your requirements.
customWoodenBoxes.step2Body: We provide pricing, lead time, and optional pre-production samples for approval.
customWoodenBoxes.step3Body: Mass production with moisture control, assembly, and in-house quality inspection.
customWoodenBoxes.step4Body: Amazon-ready packaging and worldwide shipping coordinated end-to-end.
customWoodenBoxes.faqTitle: Everything You Need to Know Before Ordering
customWoodenBoxes.faq1Q: What is your minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
customWoodenBoxes.faq1A: Our standard MOQ is typically 300–500 pcs per design, depending on box size, material, and customization requirements.
customWoodenBoxes.faq2Q: Can you customize size, logo, and packaging?
customWoodenBoxes.faq2A: Yes. We provide full OEM & private label service: custom box size & structure, laser engraving / UV print / hot stamping, custom color boxes, barcode labels, and inserts.
customWoodenBoxes.faq3Q: Do you provide samples before mass production?
customWoodenBoxes.faq3A: Yes. We offer pre-production samples for size, logo, and material confirmation. Sample lead time is usually 7–10 days.
customWoodenBoxes.faq4Q: How do you prevent cracking or warping during shipping?
customWoodenBoxes.faq4A: All wood is kiln-dried and moisture controlled at 8–12% before production. We also use export-grade packaging with corner protection and drop-tested cartons.
customWoodenBoxes.faq5Q: Can you ship directly to Amazon FBA or overseas warehouses?
customWoodenBoxes.faq5A: Yes. We provide Amazon FBA-ready packaging including barcode labels, carton markings, and drop-test packaging. We can ship to Amazon warehouses, 3PL, or your own fulfillment center worldwide.
customWoodenBoxes.faq6Q: What is your production lead time?
customWoodenBoxes.faq6A: Typical production time is 20–35 days, depending on quantity, box type, and customization. We always confirm lead time before order.
customWoodenBoxes.faq7Q: How do I choose the right wood material for my product?
customWoodenBoxes.faq7A: Choosing the right wood depends on product usage, target price, and market positioning. You can refer to our Material Selection Guide for a comparison of common wood options.
customWoodenBoxes.bottomCtaTitle: Let's build your custom wooden box program.
customWoodenBoxes.bottomCtaBody: Tell us your size, material and packaging needs — we'll send a full quote with samples and lead-time within one business day.

woodenBoxFactory.metaTitle: Wooden Box Factory in China | OEM Wooden Packaging Manufacturer
woodenBoxFactory.metaDesc: Wooden box factory in China offering OEM and custom wooden packaging. Factory-direct manufacturing for gift boxes, retail packaging and private label brands.
woodenBoxFactory.heroImageAlt: Wooden box factory in China — Xiamen Chic Homeware
woodenBoxFactory.heroLead: A wooden box factory based in China — export-quality wooden boxes for packaging, gift, and storage applications. We work directly with brands, wholesalers, and importers seeking stable OEM production.
woodenBoxFactory.whoTitle: A Dedicated Wooden Box Manufacturer in China
woodenBoxFactory.whoIntro: Clear production focus on wooden boxes — not mixed product categories. We supply for retail packaging, promotional gifts, and home storage. Operating as a factory rather than a trading company, we maintain direct control over material selection, production processes, and quality inspection.
woodenBoxFactory.capsTitle: Our Wooden Box Factory & Production Capability
woodenBoxFactory.capsIntro: Equipped for medium to large-scale production and export-oriented manufacturing.
woodenBoxFactory.cap1Body: Precision cutting and structural assembly based on box structure requirements.
woodenBoxFactory.cap2Body: Manual and machine sanding to achieve consistent surface quality across batches.
woodenBoxFactory.cap3Body: Laser engraving, screen printing, hot stamping — applied to order specifications.
woodenBoxFactory.cap4Body: Drop-tested cartons, palletization, and full export documentation support.
woodenBoxFactory.processIntro: A structured production flow designed to ensure consistent quality and stable output.
woodenBoxFactory.step1Body: Wood selection and moisture control before production to ensure structural stability.
woodenBoxFactory.step2Body: Precision cutting and assembly based on box structure requirements.
woodenBoxFactory.step3Body: Manual and machine sanding to achieve consistent surface quality.
woodenBoxFactory.step4Body: Logo marking applied according to order specifications — laser, print, or stamp.
woodenBoxFactory.step5Body: Final inspection and packing before export shipment.
woodenBoxFactory.whyTitle: Why Work Directly with a Factory
woodenBoxFactory.whyIntro: Working directly with a factory offers clear advantages compared to catalog suppliers or trading companies.
woodenBoxFactory.why1Body: We control material sourcing and moisture content directly — not relying on second-tier suppliers.
woodenBoxFactory.why2Body: Clear pricing structure with no hidden trading fees. You see the real factory cost.
woodenBoxFactory.why3Body: Direct in-factory sampling means changes happen in days, not weeks.
woodenBoxFactory.why4Body: Private label and custom branding handled in-house — no trading layer in between.
woodenBoxFactory.why5Body: Every box designed with manufacturing reality in mind — wood movement, joint tolerance, production yield.
woodenBoxFactory.qcTitle: Quality Control in Wooden Box Manufacturing
woodenBoxFactory.qcIntro: Our quality control system minimizes variation between approved samples and mass production.
woodenBoxFactory.qcImageAlt: Wooden box factory quality control inspection
woodenBoxFactory.boxCatsIntro: We manufacture wooden boxes across multiple application categories — OEM and private label production.
woodenBoxFactory.boxCat1Body: Custom wooden jewelry boxes for brands, retailers, and private label jewelry collections.
woodenBoxFactory.boxCat2Body: Luxury wooden watch boxes for watch brands, collectors, and private label packaging.
woodenBoxFactory.boxCat3Body: Custom wooden tea boxes for loose leaf tea, gift sets, and retail display packaging.
woodenBoxFactory.boxCat4Body: Multipurpose wooden storage boxes with lids for home organization, gifting, and retail use.
woodenBoxFactory.faq1Q: Are you a manufacturer or a trading company?
woodenBoxFactory.faq1A: We are a wooden box manufacturer with our own production facilities in China.
woodenBoxFactory.faq2Q: Where is your wooden box factory located?
woodenBoxFactory.faq2A: Our production is based in China and focused on export-oriented manufacturing.
woodenBoxFactory.faq3Q: What types of wooden boxes do you manufacture?
woodenBoxFactory.faq3A: We manufacture wooden boxes for packaging, gift, and storage purposes — gift boxes, jewelry boxes, watch boxes, wine boxes, tea boxes, and storage boxes with lids.
woodenBoxFactory.faq4Q: Do you work with overseas clients?
woodenBoxFactory.faq4A: Yes. We supply wooden boxes to overseas brands, wholesalers, and importers across North America, Europe, the UK, and Australia.
woodenBoxFactory.faq5Q: Do you support factory audits or inspections?
woodenBoxFactory.faq5A: Yes. Factory information and cooperation details can be discussed upon request.
woodenBoxFactory.bottomCtaTitle: Direct from the wooden box factory in China.
woodenBoxFactory.bottomCtaBody: Skip the middleman. Talk to the team that makes your boxes — clearer quotes, faster sampling, stable production.

customSpiceRack.metaTitle: Custom Wooden Spice Rack Manufacturer | Wooden Rack & Glass Jar Set Solutions
customSpiceRack.metaDesc: Custom wooden spice rack manufacturer in China. Wall-mounted, countertop, drawer and tiered styles with matching glass jars, wood material options, OEM customization and wholesale packaging support.
customSpiceRack.ogTitle: Custom Wooden Spice Rack Manufacturer with Glass Jar Matching Options
customSpiceRack.heroImageAlt: Custom wooden spice rack with matching glass jars — manufacturer hero
customSpiceRack.heroLead: Custom wooden spice racks for importers, wholesalers, kitchenware brands and private label buyers — different rack styles, wood materials, glass jar sets, and full OEM packaging.
customSpiceRack.stylesIntro: Different markets prefer different rack structures — countertop, wall-mounted, drawer, or tiered organizer styles based on space, jar size, and product look.
customSpiceRack.style1Body: Practical, easy to place, suitable for daily kitchen use. Works well for ready-to-sell kitchen organizer collections and retail packaging programs.
customSpiceRack.style2Body: Save working space — popular for compact kitchens. Suitable for buyers looking for functional and space-saving storage solutions.
customSpiceRack.style3Body: For cleaner kitchen layouts and hidden storage concepts. A good option for brands building a more organized kitchen collection.
customSpiceRack.style4Body: For wider product ranges — tiered, rotating and expandable rack structures help cover different selling points and price segments.
customSpiceRack.setsIntro: Match the rack with glass jar formats, lid styles, and accessories — a complete solution instead of sourcing rack and jars separately.
customSpiceRack.set1Body: Square jars, round jars, and other common spice bottle formats. Rack size and opening layout adjusted to jar dimensions and capacity.
customSpiceRack.set2Body: Bamboo lids, metal lids, or other styles. Buyers targeting natural kitchen styles often prefer wooden rack + glass jars + bamboo lid combinations.
customSpiceRack.set3Body: For more complete spice rack sets — labels, funnels, shaker lids and similar accessories that increase product value and retail presentation.
customSpiceRack.matsIntro: Material affects appearance, cost level, and how well the rack matches the rest of your kitchen collection.
customSpiceRack.mat1Body: Light natural look, sustainable, popular for eco-conscious kitchen brands. Good water resistance.
customSpiceRack.mat2Body: Warm tiger-stripe grain, premium feel, durable. Best for high-end retail and gift sets.
customSpiceRack.mat3Body: Cost-effective with a clean, neutral look. Suitable for painted finishes and farmhouse styles.
customSpiceRack.mat4Body: Rich dark grain for premium positioning. Great for luxury kitchen accessory programs.
customSpiceRack.customTitle: OEM and Custom Development for Wooden Spice Rack Projects
customSpiceRack.custom1Body: Rack dimensions, jar slots, drawer depth — adjusted to your jar dimensions and target market.
customSpiceRack.custom2Body: Laser engraving, screen print, hot stamping. On the rack body and/or packaging.
customSpiceRack.custom3Body: Build a unique style for your collection — not just a stock product.
customSpiceRack.custom4Body: Pre-production samples for approval, then stable mass production with QC.
customSpiceRack.custom5Body: Retail box, color box, kraft sleeve, FBA-ready master cartons.
customSpiceRack.custom6Body: Drop-tested cartons designed for international freight and Amazon FBA inbound.
customSpiceRack.processTitle: From Concept to Container in 5 Clear Steps
customSpiceRack.step1Body: Send your preferred rack style, jar size, material, finish, and packaging idea.
customSpiceRack.step2Body: We confirm specs, recommend the right structure, and offer a clear quotation in 24–48h.
customSpiceRack.step3Body: Pre-production sample for fit, finish, and jar matching approval.
customSpiceRack.step4Body: Stable QC standards, moisture control, consistent finishing across batches.
customSpiceRack.step5Body: Retail box, FBA-ready packaging, and worldwide shipping coordination.
customSpiceRack.faqTitle: FAQ About Custom Wooden Spice Rack Orders
customSpiceRack.faq1Q: Can you supply the wooden spice rack with glass jars?
customSpiceRack.faq1A: Yes. We can discuss spice rack sets with matching glass jar options based on your preferred style, size and market requirements.
customSpiceRack.faq2Q: Can the rack size be customized according to our jar dimensions?
customSpiceRack.faq2A: Yes. If you already have target jar dimensions or a preferred bottle format, we can review the measurements and develop a matching rack structure.
customSpiceRack.faq3Q: What wood materials can you use for spice racks?
customSpiceRack.faq3A: We can discuss bamboo, acacia, pine and other suitable wood materials depending on the design, cost target and product positioning.
customSpiceRack.faq4Q: Do you offer wall-mounted and countertop spice rack styles?
customSpiceRack.faq4A: Yes. We support different structures including countertop, wall-mounted, drawer, cabinet and tiered organizer styles.
customSpiceRack.faq5Q: Can you add our logo to the rack or packaging?
customSpiceRack.faq5A: Yes. Logo customization can be discussed based on the rack design, packaging plan and branding requirements.
customSpiceRack.faq6Q: Can you include labels, funnels or shaker lids in the set?
customSpiceRack.faq6A: Yes. We can discuss different accessory combinations for buyers who want a more complete spice rack set.
customSpiceRack.faq7Q: Do you support OEM and private label projects?
customSpiceRack.faq7A: Yes. We support OEM and private label development for suitable wooden spice rack and kitchen organizer projects.
customSpiceRack.faq8Q: Can you provide retail-ready or e-commerce packaging?
customSpiceRack.faq8A: Yes. We can discuss packaging solutions for wholesale, retail and e-commerce sales channels.
customSpiceRack.bottomCtaTitle: Send us your wooden spice rack inquiry.
customSpiceRack.bottomCtaBody: Share your preferred rack style, jar size, material choice, finish direction and packaging idea — we'll quote within one business day.

wholesaleServingTrays.metaTitle: 7 Remarkable Wholesale Wooden Serving Trays & Platters
wholesaleServingTrays.metaDesc: Sourcing food-safe options? Discover our factory-direct collection of acacia round platters, bamboo trays, and wholesale wooden serving trays for global brands.
wholesaleServingTrays.ogTitle: Wholesale Wooden Serving Trays & Platters: Premium Manufacturer
wholesaleServingTrays.heroLead: Premium wholesale wooden serving trays — factory-direct collection of acacia round platters, bamboo divided trays, and walnut charcuterie boards. Food-safe, stylish, and built for global retail.
wholesaleServingTrays.introTitle: Why Choose Our Wholesale Wooden Serving Trays?
wholesaleServingTrays.introBody1: In home decor and hospitality, plastic is out and nature is in. Wooden serving trays are no longer just functional — they're essential decor for coffee tables, ottomans, and kitchen islands.
wholesaleServingTrays.introBody2: For retailers and F&B brands, high-quality wooden platters offer a high-margin product that appeals to eco-conscious consumers. As a premier wooden serving tray manufacturer in China, we engineer durable, food-safe, and aesthetically stunning serving solutions tailored for the global market.
wholesaleServingTrays.materialsIntro: Choosing the right wood is crucial for your target market. Here's what we offer.
wholesaleServingTrays.mat1Body: High density and distinctive grain patterns — rich dark browns to golden honey tones. Naturally water-resistant and antimicrobial — top choice for cheese boards and charcuterie platters.
wholesaleServingTrays.mat2Body: Technically a grass — harder than maple, incredibly sustainable. Uniform clean blonde look. Lightweight, affordable, perfect for high-volume retail or promotional gift sets.
wholesaleServingTrays.mat3Body: Rich dark grain with elegant natural patterns. Top-tier choice for luxury serving sets and high-end charcuterie boards. Premium feel with timeless appeal.
wholesaleServingTrays.mat4Body: Excellent budget-friendly options. Softer woods perfect for painted finishes or rustic farmhouse style trays where a distressed look is desired.
wholesaleServingTrays.qualityIntro: Importing wooden products can be risky if the manufacturer doesn't understand wood science. Here's how we prevent common issues.
wholesaleServingTrays.quality1Body: We strictly dry our lumber to 8–12% moisture before production. Tray stays flat from humid China to dry climates like Arizona or Northern Europe.
wholesaleServingTrays.quality2Body: All trays finished with FDA and LFGB-compliant oils, waxes, or varnishes. Matte oil for natural feel, or high-gloss lacquer for easy cleaning — all safe for direct food contact.
wholesaleServingTrays.quality3Body: Multi-step sanding process finishing with fine-grit sandpaper. Every handle, corner, and surface is silky smooth to the touch.
wholesaleServingTrays.designsIntro: Diverse structures to meet different buyer needs.
wholesaleServingTrays.design1Body: Large rectangular trays with high sides and sturdy cutout handles. Built to hold heavy coffee pots or breakfast in bed.
wholesaleServingTrays.design2Body: Innovative divided bamboo trays with clear lids — game-changers for outdoor catering, picnics, or keeping snacks fresh and pest-free.
wholesaleServingTrays.design3Body: Premium acacia and walnut boards with handle cutouts. Made for cheese, charcuterie, and elegant tablescapes.
wholesaleServingTrays.design4Body: Christmas tree-shaped dishes, heart-shaped Valentine's platters, oval thanksgiving trays. Molds ready to boost your Q4 sales.
wholesaleServingTrays.custom1Body: Burn your logo into the tray center or handle for a permanent brand mark.
wholesaleServingTrays.custom2Body: Stain wood to match Walnut, Cherry, or Black Oak tones to fit your collection palette.
wholesaleServingTrays.custom3Body: Color sleeves, gift boxes, or PDQ displays designed to maximize shelf appeal.
wholesaleServingTrays.faq1Q: What is the MOQ for custom wholesale wooden serving trays?
wholesaleServingTrays.faq1A: For standard items, our MOQ is typically 500 pieces. However, for first-time partners, we are flexible and can support trial orders to test your market.
wholesaleServingTrays.faq2Q: How do I clean and maintain wooden serving trays?
wholesaleServingTrays.faq2A: Hand wash with mild soap and warm water. Never soak the wood or put it in the dishwasher. To maintain luster, wipe with food-grade mineral oil once a month. We can include a "Care Instruction Card" in your packaging.
wholesaleServingTrays.faq3Q: Do your trays pass food safety tests?
wholesaleServingTrays.faq3A: Yes. We can provide SGS, Intertek, or TUV test reports verifying that our finishes are lead-free, BPA-free, and safe for food contact according to FDA (USA) and LFGB (EU) standards.
wholesaleServingTrays.faq4Q: Can you handle DDP shipping to Amazon FBA?
wholesaleServingTrays.faq4A: Absolutely. We have extensive experience shipping to FBA warehouses in the US, UK, and Canada. We handle labeling, palletizing, and customs clearance — you don't have to worry about logistics.
wholesaleServingTrays.bottomCtaTitle: Build your wooden serving tray collection.
wholesaleServingTrays.bottomCtaBody: Tell us your size, material, and branding needs — we'll send a full quote with samples and lead-time within one business day.
